title: isocoma drummondii
intro: Isocoma drummondii, also known as Drummond's golden bush or Drummond's isocoma, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Isocoma drummondii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, among others. Herbal preparations of Isocoma drummondii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
